title: ColoredPlanks
description: Simple mod that adds colored planks and blocks from them for Minecraft beta 1.7.3 (for StAPI)
body:
Simple mod that adds colored planks and blocks from them for Minecraft beta 1.7.3 (for StAPI). 

Planks can be crafted from any other planks with "planks" tag (both vanilla and mods) and dye similar to colored terracota in modern Minecraft. Different block shapes uses vanilla-like recipes and modern-like recipe for fences, for the easy recipe view in game you can use [AMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/always-more-items) mod.

![Planks Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t8SehPCN/images/7cee602441c99614c452cbd257d16b0974e4e23e.png)

**Available planks block types:**
- Full blocks (crafted from 8 any planks and a dye in the center)
- Stairs (crafted from 6 planks of the same color)
- Slabs (crafted from 3 planks of the same color)
- Fences (crafted from 4 planks of the same color and 2 sticks)
- Pressure plates (crafted from 2 planks of the same color)
- Buttons (crafted from 1 plank)
